decision_commentary: TC-004 specific checks all PASS: medical_gas_systems listed in conditional_systems array; specialized_hvac listed in conditional_systems array — both with status='complete'. Required systems (structural, electrical, lighting, water) all present and status='complete'. Completeness 5: all_inputs_confirmed=true, conflicts_resolved=true. HVAC notes cover positive/negative pressure zones, HEPA filtration, 8-12 ACH per zone — full clinical HVAC specification. Timing 5: package complete before Bruno begins budget alignment (DG-09 timestamp 2026-09-25, Phase 3 end date 2026-09-24 — correct). Decision_readiness 5: Bruno can proceed to contractor pricing immediately. Auto-fail: all required systems present — PASS; no pending inputs undeclared — PASS.
